title: Aliasing, Effective Type, Provenance, and Type Punning · Invariant Recall
summary: After a delay, a release reviewer reconstructs the defined binary decoder with provenance notes contract from partial traces, compares two near-miss implementations, and retrieves prior bounds and lifetime rules before feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for defined binary decoder with provenance notes after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Access allocated and copied storage through types permitted by effective-type rules or defined character-byte paths.

Use memcpy into a live destination object for representation transfer and validate the resulting value domain.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
